definitions.text: The quality or state of being young.
examples: Her youth and beauty attracted him to her.

definitions.text: The part of life following childhood; the period of existence preceding maturity or age; the whole early part of life, from childhood, or, sometimes, from infancy, to adulthood.
examples: Make the most of your youth, it will not last forever.
I made many mistakes in my youth, but learned from them all.
There was a group of youths hanging around the parking lot, reading fashion magazines and listening to music.
